_meta.description: Pod quest hooks for Canon Engine RPG narrative system
_meta.note: Small, self-contained quest modules that can be inserted dynamically

pod_quests.name: The Missing Merchant
pod_quests.hook: A merchant hasn't arrived at the market. His wife fears the worst.

beats.description: Gather information about the merchant's route
Search the road between settlements
Find the merchant's overturned cart and signs of bandits
Track bandits to their camp and rescue merchant (or recover body)

pod_quests.name: Fever Dream
pod_quests.hook: A child has fallen gravely ill. The local healer needs rare herbs from the dangerous forest.

beats.description: Speak with the healer about the illness
Collect moonpetal herbs from the forest
Wolves guard the herb grove
Deliver herbs and help prepare the cure

pod_quests.name: One Last Fight
pod_quests.hook: An aging warrior begs you to help him clear the tomb where his comrades fell decades ago.

beats.description: The old warrior joins your party temporarily
Travel to the ancient battlefield
Explore the tomb, fighting undead soldiers
The warrior pays respects at the fallen comrades' graves
The tomb guardian awakens - defend the warrior

pod_quests.name: Under the Table
pod_quests.hook: A shady figure offers good coin to deliver a 'package' with no questions asked.

beats.description: Approached in an alley or tavern
Accept the job (morality choice)
Travel to destination, avoiding guard patrols
Guards, rival smugglers, or conscience intervene
Complete or refuse the delivery

pod_quests.name: What Lies Beneath
pod_quests.hook: Villagers report hearing whispers from the old well. Animals refuse to drink from the stream.

beats.description: Examine the well and surrounding area
Climb down into the well
Discover a hidden chamber with necrotic energy
Find a necrotic artifact corrupting the water
Destroy, take, or seal the artifact

pod_quests.name: Not the Only Heroes
pod_quests.hook: Another group of adventurers is competing for the same prize. Race them to the treasure!

beats.description: Meet the rival party at the dungeon entrance
Navigate the dungeon faster than the rivals
Forced to cooperate against a greater threat
Split the treasure, fight for it, or form an alliance
